Alt Rock.caption: Energetic alternative rock track with crunchy guitars, steady live drums, and a catchy hook. Modern mix, tight low end, wide choruses, slightly gritty male vocal.

Indie Rock.caption: Indie rock with jangly guitars, steady live drums, melodic bassline, and a catchy singalong chorus. Slightly raw, intimate mix with room ambience, bright midrange guitars, and energetic dynamics. Light synth layers allowed, but guitars stay the focus.
Indie Rock.lm_negative_prompt: EDM club kick, dubstep wobble bass, trap 808 dominance

Hard Rock.caption: Hard rock track with thick distorted guitars, punchy live drums, driving bass, and a gritty powerful vocal. Big choruses, palm-muted riffs, and tight stops. Modern, loud mix with controlled low end and wide guitars, but still feels like a real band performance.
Hard Rock.lm_negative_prompt: chill ambient, reggae one-drop, orchestral strings as main focus, soft jazz

Punk Rock.caption: Fast punk rock with aggressive downstroke guitars, snappy drums, and an urgent shouty vocal. Short sections, simple power-chord progressions, and high energy. Dry, upfront mix—tight, no glossy effects, minimal reverb, and raw attitude throughout.
Punk Rock.lm_negative_prompt: slow ballad, polished pop sheen, EDM risers and drops, trap triplets

Post Rock.caption: Post-rock with clean guitars building into massive crescendos, cinematic drums, and long evolving sections. Spacious reverb and delay, wide stereo image, and emotional swells. Vocals optional and sparse—if present, they are distant and textural, not lyrical hooks.
Post Rock.lm_negative_prompt: four-on-the-floor club mix, rap verses, bright disco funk, jump-up DnB

Crunge Rock.caption: Raw 90s grunge/crunch rock track with loud-quiet-loud dynamics and an angry, cathartic mood. Dirty overdriven guitars with thick, crunchy power chords and gritty pick attack, slightly detuned, occasional feedback swells. Bass is heavy and simple, locked to the kick. Drums are punchy and human: tight snare crack, aggressive hi-hats, explosive fills into choruses. Vocals are raspy, worn, and emotional—half-sung, half-shouted—melody is simple and unforgettable, with occasional double-tracking in the chorus. Structure: tense verse, massive chorus, raw bridge, final chorus meltdown. Mix is lo-fi but powerful: saturated guitars, limited polish, room ambience on drums, no glossy pop sheen, no EDM sidechain, no orchestral strings. Negative prompt: pop hook, modern trap hats, shiny autotune lead, EDM supersaw, bright uplifting chord progressions, smooth R&B runs.
Crunge Rock.negatives: bright pop harmony, liquid DnB, funky disco groove, reggae skank
Crunge Rock.lm_negative_prompt: bright pop harmony, liquid DnB, funky disco groove, reggae skank

Metal.caption:
A high-tempo thrash metal track driven by aggressive palm-muted rhythm guitars in D tuning, sharp stop-start chugs, and rapid alternate picking. Drums are fast and tight with relentless double-kick bursts, occasional half-time breakdowns, and hard snare accents. Bass follows the guitar tightly with added grit and distortion.

Vocals alternate between harsh growls, barked shouts, and feral howls, with gang vocals on the chorus for maximum impact. Overall mood is confrontational, mechanical, and empowering, with an industrial edge and a sense of rapid acceleration, efficiency, and controlled chaos. Perfect for high-energy, no-nonsense intensity.
Metal.negatives: pop sparkle, autotune R&B runs, reggae groove, jazz swing, orchestral waltz, tropical house, dubstep drops, lo-fi chill
Metal.lm_negative_prompt: pop sparkle, autotune R&B runs, reggae groove, jazz swing, orchestral waltz, tropical house, dubstep drops, lo-fi chill

Roots Reggae.caption: Classic roots reggae groove with offbeat guitar skank, warm organ bubble, steady one-drop drum feel, and deep melodic bass. Positive conscious vibe, sunny mix, relaxed tempo.

Dub.caption: Dub reggae with heavy melodic bass, one-drop drums, and lots of space: spring reverb, tape echoes, and dropouts. Minimal vocals, more instrumental focus, with occasional chopped vocal snippets. Warm analog tone, deep low end, and hypnotic groove.
Dub.lm_negative_prompt: metal screaming, EDM supersaw drops, fast breakbeats, glossy pop chorus

Dancehall.caption: Modern dancehall rhythm with punchy kick, crisp snare, syncopated percussion, and a rolling bassline. Energetic toasting style vocal, callouts and swagger. Bright but tight mix, strong groove for dancing, with minimal melodic clutter.
Dancehall.lm_negative_prompt: orchestral symphony, jazz improvisation, slow ambient drone, heavy rock guitars

Lovers Rock.caption: Lovers rock with smooth reggae groove, warm bass, gentle skank guitar, soft keys, and a romantic, laid-back feel. Light percussion, sweet melodies, and a silky vocal delivery with tasteful reverb. Cozy, warm mix with rounded highs.
Lovers Rock.lm_negative_prompt: aggressive trap 808, harsh industrial, fast punk, dubstep growls

Reggae Fusion.caption: Reggae fusion blending classic skank and bass with contemporary pop/R&B rhythm elements. Clean drums, warm keys, catchy melodic hooks, and an upbeat feel. Modern mix with clear vocals, but keeps reggae swing and offbeat emphasis.
Reggae Fusion.lm_negative_prompt: speed metal, extreme distortion, dark techno, drum & bass tempo

Bebop.caption: Fast bebop jazz with walking bass, swinging ride cymbal, tight acoustic drums, and virtuosic horn improvisation. Complex chord changes, lively comping piano, and an intimate club-room sound. Natural dynamics, minimal compression, real-instrument feel.
Bebop.lm_negative_prompt: EDM, trap 808, heavy metal distortion, reggae one-drop

Smooth Jazz.caption: Smooth jazz with silky electric piano chords, mellow sax lead, tight groove drums, and warm bass. Polished mix, soft reverb, and relaxed tempo. Light funk touches allowed, but keep it calm and sophisticated, late-night lounge vibe.
Smooth Jazz.lm_negative_prompt: punk, aggressive techno, harsh screaming vocals, noisy lo-fi

Jazz Fusion.caption: Jazz fusion with electric bass, tight funk drums, Rhodes keys, and expressive synth/lead guitar solos. Syncopated grooves, extended chords, and clean but punchy mix. Energetic, technical, and modern without turning into EDM.
Jazz Fusion.lm_negative_prompt: four-on-the-floor club, trap hats, orchestral symphony, reggae skank

Vocal Jazz.caption: Vocal jazz with brushed drums, upright bass, tasteful piano comping, and intimate smoky vocals. Swing or slow ballad feel, subtle reverb, and natural dynamics. Emphasis on phrasing, warmth, and classic jazz harmony.
Vocal Jazz.lm_negative_prompt: autotuned pop chorus, dubstep drops, heavy distortion, fast DnB

Nu Jazz.caption: Nu jazz blending jazz chords with modern electronic grooves: broken beats, warm bass, Rhodes stabs, and atmospheric textures. Minimal vocal snippets or none. Clean, modern mix with groove focus and jazzy harmonic color.
Nu Jazz.lm_negative_prompt: metal guitars, strict classical orchestra, bright teen pop, reggae one-drop

Liquid DnB.caption: Liquid drum & bass at 170–175 BPM with smooth pads, soulful chords, rolling bass, and clean breakbeats. Warm atmospheres, melodic leads, and an emotional uplifting vibe. Polished mix with punchy drums and controlled sub.
Liquid DnB.lm_negative_prompt: dubstep halftime, metal guitars, reggae swing, orchestral symphony

Neurofunk.caption: Neurofunk at 172–176 BPM with dark twisted reese bass, sharp drums, and futuristic sound design. Tight, aggressive groove, crisp snares, and heavy low-end movement. Minimal vocals, high-intensity club mix, cold mechanical atmosphere.
Neurofunk.lm_negative_prompt: pop ballad, acoustic folk, reggae skank, bright major chords

Jump Up.caption: Jump up drum & bass with bouncy wobble bass, playful call-and-response stabs, and energetic drums at 174 BPM. Simple catchy hooks, big impact drops, and a loud club-ready mix. Short vocal shouts optional, but keep it fun and punchy.
Jump Up.lm_negative_prompt: smooth jazz, classical orchestra, slow ambient, heavy metal

Jungle.caption: Jungle with chopped Amen-style breaks, rolling sub-bass, reggae/dub-inspired stabs, and fast 160–175 BPM energy. Raw, gritty texture, rhythmic complexity, and old-school rave atmosphere. Minimal melodic clutter, breakbeat-led momentum.
Jungle.lm_negative_prompt: four-on-the-floor house, pop chorus, orchestral cinematic score

Darkstep.caption: Darkstep drum & bass with relentless heavy drums, ominous drones, and aggressive bass hits at 175 BPM. Industrial edge, tense transitions, and a grim atmosphere. Clean but brutal mix, no pop melodies, minimal vocals or only dark whispers.
Darkstep.lm_negative_prompt: uplifting trance, reggae sunshine vibe, smooth R&B singing, acoustic jazz trio
